raw_text:
[PAGE 6]
VALMIKI RAMAYANA
SUNDARA KANDA
CHAPTER 1: Hanuman's Devotion

1. Hanuman resolved to cross the ocean to Lanka in search of Sita. He expanded his body, invoked Rama's name, and leapt from Mount Mahendra into the sky.
2. Facing many obstacles, Hanuman flew with unyielding devotion, successfully landing on the shores of Lanka to bring hope to Sita.
cleaned_text:
SUNDARA KANDA
CHAPTER 1: Hanuman's Devotion

1. Hanuman resolved to cross the ocean to Lanka in search of Sita. He expanded his body, invoked Rama's name, and leapt from Mount Mahendra into the sky.
2. Facing many obstacles, Hanuman flew with unyielding devotion, successfully landing on the shores of Lanka to bring hope to Sita.
